chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3136 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE PRIORITY. 1. For hearing of Misc. No.13622 of 2025 (Stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 11.07.2025 Mr. Shaheer Roshan Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner. --------------------- Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, Advocat files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent/Commissioner Inland Revenue Zone-II, Large Taxpayer’s Office, Karachi, which is taken on record. Both parties have agreed to decide this Petition by directing the Commissioner Inland (Appeals-II), Karachi/Respondent No.2 to decide the pending Appeal expeditiously preferably within 60 days from the date of receiving of this Order. In view of the above, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner Inland (Appeals-II), Karachi to decide the pending Appeal within said period. In the meantime, no coercive action shall be taken within said period. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
